title: Grim kingdoms: Lost structures & ruins
description: Adds forts, citadels, castles, with vanilla custom mobs/ hidden items
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dvSy8Dbqd84" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---
![j](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ca53e73a931b7186c7a62ea995740ae19951dd3.jpeg)


---

**Grim Kingdoms: Lost Structures & Ruins** adds 17 fantasy and medieval forts, citadels, and castles to your Minecraft world, inhabited by custom vanilla mobs, including feral white rabbits, wolves, and scrabbling, cunning gnomes that skitter through frozen ruins, etc...

![....](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9401ff6207110bf11751ee448d288d5e6cd80ff_0.webp)

---

At the moment these structures can appear only 
in winter related biomes which include: 🌨

- snowy_plains
- snowy_beach
- snowy_taiga
- grove
- jagged_peaks
- frozen_peaks
- snowy_slopes
- ice_spikes

, all built using vanilla features only (FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK)
Terralith compatibility + other terrain mod support,(no floaters!),
Vanilla loot tables + hidden special items and features

---

![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad49da1d6e10e79c4a8e13f16510c827ffdaa5ba.jpeg)
**Fully compatible with everything**🧙🏼‍♂️:

✨Fully compatible with Geophilic,

✨Fully compatible with JJ Thunder to the Max,

✨Fully compatible with William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld,

✨Fully compatible with William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere,

✨Mostly supports Biomes O' Plenty,

✨Mostly supports Oh The Biomes We've Gone,


[![Join the Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370b72768ac048862cb8fb192e72d2d9440864e9.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/hS7rrqDV](https://discord.gg/3xCJHuFBqQ))

![gg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75f2dec41b8f7aaacf8d47ab263f3c0a1055cfd5.jpeg)

CASTLES FOR ALL BIOMES . hopefully in the far future ._.
